case_title: MRS.LAURA RODRIQUEZ-KRUPP VS MR. ROBERT J. ESTRADA et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MR. ROBERT J. ESTRADA
